summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 晶片需求強勁與 Computex 產業利多，Teradyne 在分析師評級上調與獲利成長預期下表現強勢。

bullish.title: Skyworks Solutions and Teradyne Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: Nvidia 執行長黃仁勳於 Computex 的主題演講激勵了半導體類股，Teradyne 作為測試設備供應商直接受惠於 AI 產業鏈的擴張。

bullish.title: FormFactor, Amkor, and Teradyne Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: Micron 的強勁財報表現釋出 AI 驅動晶片需求持續成長的訊號，帶動 Teradyne 等半導體設備股股價上漲。

bullish.title: Assessing Teradyne (TER) Valuation After Upgraded Analyst Ratings And Higher Earnings Estimates
bullish.reason: 分析師上調目標價與獲利預估，且公司在 Zacks 評級中表現優異，顯示市場對其基本面信心增強。

bullish.title: Micron & 2 Profitable Stocks to Buy in June for Explosive Upside
bullish.reason: Teradyne 被篩選為 6 月份值得買入的獲利型股票，主要歸功於其強勁的淨利率與穩健的獲利成長表現。

bullish.title: Teradyne (TER) Up 22.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
bullish.reason: 自上季財報公布以來股價已上漲 22.7 %，市場正評估其後續成長動能是否能延續。

neutral.title: Teradyne, Inc. (TER) Presents at Bank of America 2026 Global Technology Conference Transcript
neutral.reason: 此為公司參與 Bank of America 全球科技會議的逐字稿，屬於例行性投資人溝通，未包含重大突發性利多或利空消息。

neutral.title: If You Invested $1000 in Teradyne a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
neutral.reason: 回顧性投資績效分析，對短期股價走勢影響有限，僅作為長期投資價值參考。
